calendar.matters:
Osc For Change Of Name Of A Minor: Jeremy Benjamin Fustine.
Off Calendar Sep-14-2004 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Valarie Papale
Petitioner: Jonathan M. Fustine, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Jeremy Benjamin Fustine, was swron and examined.
Minor does not reside in San Francisco. Court lacks jurisdiction.
Petition is denied without prejudice,

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-27-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name for an adult and a minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Lacks the minor's mother consent and/or proof of service, the OSC for change of name of a Minor: Jeremy Benjamin Fustine, is continued to Sept. 14, 2004 at 9:00 am in Dept. 218, for the Petitioner to submit proof of service to the minor's mother of new OSC hearing date.
Petitioner: Jonathan Martin Fustine, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Jonathan Martin Fustini.
Decree signed in open court.
